message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 25
  BoxPadding 10
  MessageAlign left
}

actor user
participant FindWorkbookUI
participant UIController
participant FindWorkbooksController
participant StartWorkbooksSearch
participant "fw : FindWorkbooks" as fw
participant Paths
participant Files
participant Cleansheets

user -> FindWorkbookUI : startWorkbooksSearch()
activate FindWorkbookUI
FindWorkbookUI -> FindWorkbooksController : create()
activate FindWorkbooksController

alt adicionar
  loop todas as adicoes
    FindWorkbookUI -> FindWorkbooksController : add(path)
  end
else remover
  loop todas as remocoes
    FindWorkbookUI -> FindWorkbooksController : remover(path)
  end
end

FindWorkbookUI -> FindWorkbooksController : startWorkbooksSearch()

loop todas as paths
  FindWorkbooksController -> StartWorkbooksSearch : create(path, WorkbooksFoundList)
  activate StartWorkbooksSearch
  FindWorkbooksController -> StartWorkbooksSearch : startWorkbooksSearch()

  StartWorkbooksSearch -> StartWorkbooksSearch : create()
  note right of StartWorkbooksSearch
    this create() call represents
    the creation of a new thread
    of this same class
  end note
  StartWorkbooksSearch -> StartWorkbooksSearch : start()
  StartWorkbooksSearch -> StartWorkbooksSearch : run()

  StartWorkbooksSearch -> fw : create()
  activate fw

  StartWorkbooksSearch -> Paths : p : get()
  StartWorkbooksSearch -> Files : walkFileTree(p, fw)

  deactivate fw
  deactivate StartWorkbooksSearch
end

user -> FindWorkbookUI : openFoundWorkbook()
FindWorkbookUI -> UIController : app : getApp()
note right of FindWorkbookUI
  f represents a file that is created when
  the user selects a workbook to open from
  the list of found workbooks
end note
UIController -> Cleansheets : w : getWorkbook(f)
UIController -> FindWorkbookUI : setActiveWorkbook(w)

deactivate FindWorkbooksController
deactivate FindWorkbookUI
@enduml
